creator: shanee@augusta.de
text:
while make install autoconf-2.12 there is a error 

	two times no succes
	root@rabbit# make install
	>> Checksum OK for autoconf-2.12.tar.gz.
	===>  Building for autoconf-2.12
	makeinfo -I. ./standards.texi --no-split --output=standards.info
	Making info file `standards.info' from `./standards.texi'.
	./standards.texi:7: Unknown info command `dircategory'.
	*** Error code 2

	Stop.
	*** Error code 1

	Stop.
	*** Error code 1

	Stop.
	*** Error code 1

	Stop.

	while the third time it works???

Fix: 

?
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/devel/autoconf;make install
